zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Brian Thornhill於1301年7月9日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾時，他的父親John Thornhill52歲，母親Beatrice Talboner33歲。他和Joan Fitzwilliam至少有1個兒子。他去世於1369年10月3日在匈牙利亞-納昆-索爾諾可也沙阿洛姆享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Brian Thornhill于1301年7月9日出生在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾时，他的父亲John Thornhill52岁，母亲Beatrice Talboner33岁。他和Joan Fitzwilliam至少有1个儿子。他去世于1369年10月3日在匈牙利亞-納昆-索爾諾可也沙阿洛姆享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Brian Thornhill was born on 9 July 1301, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thornhill, was 52 and his mother, Beatrice Talboner, was 33. He had at least 1 son with Joan Fitzwilliam. He died on 3 October 1369, in Hegyeshalom, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok, Hungary, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Brian Thornhill est né le 9 juillet 1301, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thornhill, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Talboner, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan Fitzwilliam. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1369, à Hegyeshalom, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok, Hongrie, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Brian Thornhill am 9. Juli 1301 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thornhill 52 und seine Mutter Beatrice Talboner 33. Er hatte mit Joan Fitzwilliam mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1369 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Hegyeshalom, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok, Ungarn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Thornhill è nato il il 9 luglio 1301 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Thornhill, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Talboner, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joan Fitzwilliam. Morì il 3 ottobre 1369, nel Hegyeshalom, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok, Ungheria, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Thornhillが1301年7月9日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父John Thornhillは52歳，母Beatrice Talbonerは33歳であった。彼はJoan Fitzwilliamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1369年10月3日にハンガリージaスズ-ナグイクン-スゾルノクヘグイエシャロムで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Thornhill(이)가 1301년 7월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thornhill(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Talboner(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Joan Fitzwilliam(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1369년 10월 3일 헝가리 ja스즈-나그이쿤-스졸노크 헤그예샤롬에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 July 1301–3 October 1369: 9 de julho de 1301–3 de outubro de 1369
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Thornhill nasceu em 9 de julho de 1301, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thornhill, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Talboner, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joan Fitzwilliam. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1369, em Hegyeshalom, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok, Hungria, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Brian Thornhill родился 9 июля 1301 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thornhill было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Talboner, 33. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan Fitzwilliam. Он умер 3 октября 1369 г. в местности хегиешеилом, джaсз-нагикун-сзолнок, Венгрия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.9 July 1301–3 October 1369: 9 de julio de 1301–3 de octubre de 1369
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Brian Thornhill nació el 9 de julio de 1301, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thornhill, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Beatrice Talboner, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joan Fitzwilliam. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1369, en Hegyeshalom, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok, Hungría, a la edad de 68 años.
